name: Salvager
text: Reads a wreck-field like an orchard.

name: Smith
text: Bronze now, reef-iron soon, tidebrass someday.

name: Brinewife
text: Cook, alchemist, and the reason anyone survives winter. The title is ancient and not negotiable.

name: Warden
text: Watches the walls, the night, and the Taken. Understaff this and learn why it's a class.

name: Reef-Runner
text: Fast, light, and back before the light fails. Usually.

name: Priest
text: Arrives as a pilgrim to a chapel; conducts rites, Rededication, and Revelation; sells rumors. Each priest serves one god (assigned at arrival).

name: Reefkin Crafter
text: The finest craftfolk left alive. Only a SAVED Reefkin settlement sends one.

name: Brinefolk Stillmaster
text: Distills god-water in your own village. Only a SAVED Brinefolk settlement teaches this.
